allow: Bash(cd /tmp && tar -xzf idea.tar.gz && ls -la | grep idea)
Bash(kubectl get svc prometheus grafana alertmanager)
Bash(docker pull prom/prometheus:v2.48.0 && docker pull grafana/grafana:10.2.3 && docker pull prom/alertmanager:v0.26.0)

Bash(docker save prom/prometheus:v2.48.0 | k3s ctr images import /dev/stdin && docker save grafana/grafana:10.2.3 | k3s ctr images import /dev/stdin && docker save prom/alertmanager:v0.26.0 | k3s ctr images import /dev/stdin)
Bash(kubectl delete pod -l app=prometheus && kubectl delete pod -l app=grafana && kubectl delete pod -l app=alertmanager)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:9090/-/healthy && echo " - Prometheus is healthy" && curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/health && echo " - Grafana is healthy" && curl -s http://localhost:9093/-/healthy && echo " - Alertmanager is healthy")
Bash(kubectl get all -l app=prometheus -o wide && kubectl get all -l app=grafana -o wide && kubectl get all -l app=alertmanager -o wide)
Bash(kubectl exec -it deployment/prometheus -- wget -qO- http://prometheus:9090/api/v1/targets | grep -A 5 "burndown-backend")
Bash(kubectl get pods -l app=burndown-backend -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}' | xargs -I {} kubectl exec {} -- curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/v1/actuator/prometheus | head -20)
Bash(kubectl exec deployment/burndown-backend -- curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/v1/actuator 2>&1 | grep prometheus)
Bash(kubectl exec deployment/prometheus -- wget -qO- http://localhost:9090/api/v1/targets 2>&1 | grep -o '"job":"[^"]*"' | sort -u)
Bash(kubectl exec deployment/burndown-backend -- curl -v http://localhost:8080/api/v1/actuator 2>&1 | head -50)
Bash(kubectl exec deployment/burndown-backend -- ps aux | grep java)
Bash(sleep 30 && kubectl exec deployment/burndown-backend -- curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/v1/actuator/prometheus 2>&1 | head -50)
Bash(kubectl delete deployment alertmanager prometheus grafana)
